'T TPfJ ^ fe# (17) s f t ^ - ^ m ^ M t , 7 f ^ ^ * r ( e r t o * m r ) w&q qros(i)(i)%?r^T 14, SR^-frs, ^ f e # (18) eftTf^^RRTRT,'?TWrW^l(#^'?mT) ^ F T *JRT5(l)(i)%(HnT (19) jftfMfafog, m^ W& (^ft;W*l) WZ& «lTO5(l)(i)%fl?(T 43, 45, ^FSen^Jj ^ fi^ft [Til.^. 11-26/2003-1^ •5^,'St] ura u^hiHirfl ^ t "^ «fti 68 GI/2005 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY IPARTII^SEC. 3(H)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICAIION New Delhi, the 5th January, 2005 S.O. 24(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 5 A of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, I960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 918(E), dated 12th August, 2004, namely .— (1) in the said notification, after serial No. (13) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be inserted, namely:— (14) Dr. Narayan Singh Manaklao, M.P. (Rajya Sabha) V & P.O. Manaklao, Distt. Jodhpur, Rajasthan (21, Ferozeshah Road, New Delhi) (15) Shri, JesudasuSeelam, M.P. (RajyaSabha) H.No. 6-195/11, Darivada, Kothapalem Bapatla, Andhra Pradesh, (A-51, Nivcdita Kunj, Type VQtrs, Sector 10, R. K. Puram, NewDelhi-22) (16) Shri Jaswant SinhBishnoi, M.P. (Lok Sabha) C-7, M S. Flat, B.K.S. Marg, New Delhi (17) Smt. Maneka Gandhi, M.P (Lok Sabha) 14, AshokaRoad, New Delhi (IS) ShriRabindraKumarRana,MP. (Lok Sabha) A-4, MS. Flat, New Delhi. (19) Shri Bijcndra Singh, M.P. (Lok Sabha) 43,45. Secy. Note: The principal notification reconstituting the Animal Welfare Brard of India was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 918(E), dated 12th August, 2004.
